emails.subject: Re: Cooper Alliance Pre-buy program
emails.body: Before I answer this email, thought I would confirm with you how we intend collecting and distributing the $180K rebate for the pre-buy program. The methanol plant contributed $300K toward the $1.500K goal. Thanks, Shirley Jo Dickens-Wilson Director Process and Operating Equipment Global Strategic Sourcing 713-646-7545 shirley.jo.wilson@enron.com Forwarded by Shirley Jo Wilson/NA/Enron on 12/12/2000 02:52 PM Kerry Roper 12/12/2000 08:29 AM
